Your privacy is a top priority to us, and this Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information. We made apps like Lock Screen , Flash Alerts ,AppLock etc.

decoder_heading: What information we use and how we use it
ident_heading: What information we use and how we use it
heading_content_part: What information we use and how we use it:
Information that we collect :- Information that we get about you from other services Such as Google Play and others.
This information includes:

decoder_heading: Read your text messages (SMS or MMS)
ident_heading: Read your text messages (SMS or MMS)
heading_content_part: Read your text messages (SMS or MMS) :- We do not save or upload your messages. We use this Permission to read your text messages when you search messages in search bar or announce the sender name while some one is send you a message, you will identify it without looking to your smart phone.

Read phone status and identity :- This permission allows “NAMIT” to recognize an incoming / outgoing call and to switch between the User System interface and call interface or announces / shows the caller name while some one is calling, you will identify it without looking to your smart phone.
Take Pictures and videos :- This Permission allows “NAMIT” to use your device’s camera to take Photos / Videos and turn ON/OFF Camera Flash.We do not save or upload your photos/videos.
Microphone: we can use a microphone for entertainment purpose only, in some app only. we can not collect any personal voice or recording.
Accounts : “NAMIT” is never collect any personal accounts or account ids for personal use.
Connect and disconnect from Wi-Fi :- This permission is used in “NAMIT”settings and notification toolbar in order to connect and disconnect from Wi-Fi.
Device information :- Device-specific information such as your hardware model and operating system version. We DO NOT collect any of your unique identification.
Read Your Contacts :- “NAMIT” does not save or upload your contacts. Permission to access contact information is used when you search contacts Real App Developer bar.
Adjust your wallpaper size :- This permission allows users to crop “NAMIT” wallpaper to the desired size.
Set wallpaper :- This permission allows users to set a selected “NAMIT” image as their wallpaper.

Photos,Media,Files :- We can not access any personal pictures,Videos or any Files for personal use, User can Access his selected pictures only for making a photo frame,video,we can not collect those photo,Video or any files.
Camera: We can access camera for take a photo of user in creating her/his photo frame and we can not access his personal photo or any personal videos.
Anonymous identifiers :- we use anonymous identifiers when you interact with services such as advertising services and others.
2) How we share your information :-

decoder_heading: We may retain third parties to perform services on our behalf
ident_heading: We may retain third parties to perform services on our behalf
heading_content_part: We may retain third parties to perform services on our behalf and

decoder_heading: We may collaborate with third parties with respect to particular products or services
ident_heading: we may collaborate with third parties with respect to particular products or services
heading_content_part: we may collaborate with third parties with respect to particular products or services.

decoder_heading: These third parties may be provided with access to the information needed to perform their functions
ident_heading: These third parties may be provided with access to the information needed to perform their functions
heading_content_part: These third parties may be provided with access to the information needed to perform their functions, as long as they agree to keep the information confidential.

decoder_heading: We reserve the right to disclose your information as required by law
ident_heading: We reserve the right to disclose your information as required by law
heading_content_part: We reserve the right to disclose your information as required by law, when we believe disclosure is necessary to comply with a regulatory requirement, judicial proceeding, court order, or legal process served on us, or to protect the safety, rights, or property of our users, the public or “NAMIT”.
3) Children’s Privacy :- We are committed to protecting the privacy of children. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under the age of 13.

4) Changes to the Privacy Policy :- “NAMIT” may, in its sole discretion, Change this Privacy Policy from time to time, any and all changes will be reflected here and the date new versions are posted will be stated at the top of this Privacy Policy, so please review it periodically..

5) How we Protect your information :- We have implemented commercially reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information from accidental loss and from loss, misuse and unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration and destruction. However,please note that although we take reasonable measures to protect your information, no app, website, Internet transmission, computer system or wireless connection is completely secure.

6) Security :- “NAMIT” is very concerned about safeguarding the confidentiality of your information. We do not collect Personal Information, and we employ administrative, physical and electronic measures designed to protect your Non-Personal Information from unauthorized access and use. Please be aware that no security measures that we take to protect your information is absolutely guaranteed to avoid unauthorized access or use of your Non-Personal Information which is impenetrable.
7) Advertisement in App :- We use StartApp SDK for advertisements in our applications. There could be errors in the programming and sometime programming errors may cause unwanted side effects.
